    🎼 Sustain Chord

    Hold any single chord and see what to play over it — uses the same Guide Style and Intervals toggle as Guide Solo above.

    BPM

    🎯 ii-V-I / Trade-Fours Drill

    Generates a chart of randomized ii-V-I turnarounds through every key — load it and play/Guide-Solo/quiz it exactly like any song.

    Guide Style Tap a colored pill to HEAR its scale · pick a Guide Style to drill one technique.
    Click a chord to edit it — the 🎓 panel shows its analysis & substitutions. Hover a bar for |: :| endings & % tools. ⛶ Fit sizes the whole song to one screen.

    🎵 Import from iReal Pro

    Paste an irealb:// link (from iReal Pro: Share → Copy Link / Forum post), or choose an HTML file exported from iReal Pro (Share → Export → HTML). A playlist link imports every song and automatically creates a Setlist with the same name.

    🪕 Import from Busk.town

    Paste a busk.town song link (e.g. https://busk.town/songs/…). This reads chords only — lyrics are never imported or stored, only the chord chart itself.

    Couldn't fetch it directly (the busk.town server may not allow cross-site requests). Open this link in a new tab, then copy ALL of its text and paste it below:
